title: Amtech E2000 200mm (8") Combination Sharpening Stone
features: TWO GRITS: This 200mm (8") dual-sided aluminium oxide combination sharpening stone is has coarse 120 grit (darker grey) on one side medium 240 grit (lighter grey) on the other side
VERSATILE: It is ideal for sharpening chisel blades, knives, scissor blades, etc
description: Product Description Two sided stone with Coarse and Medium grits (120 and 240 grits) can be used for sharpening chisel blades, knives, scissor blades approx. Size: 200 x 50 x 25mm - - there's nothing more satisfying that a job well done, whether that's a major project or a small repair but some of us need a bit of a helping hand in terms of getting the right tool for the job. Amtech have literally thousands of high quality products and you are almost guaranteed to find exactly what your looking for. Safety Warning No
